ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Avocado, flesh without skin, pitted, raw
Cream and similar, fat content unknown (average)
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: mashed avocado, finely spicy, : ngrédients : water, avocado (1496), chopped tomatoes (10%), onions (7%), flour of wheat, preparation of cheese, cream, starch, modified maize, rapeseed oil, flakes of potato solids (contains sulphites), mashed garlic extract, whey (milk), salt, spices,juis of green lemon concentrate (contains sulftes whey powder (milk), sugar, siopde anhydrous glucose, correctors of acidity: glucono-delta-lactone,   citric acid, jalapeno pepper, dehydrated herbs , dextrose, antioxidant: ascorbic acid, dyes chlorophyllins, lutein
